kzchatbot-name: Display name of the chatbot, shown in the user interface
kzchatbot-toplink-general-settings: Navigation link to the general chatbot settings special page
kzchatbot-toplink-banned-words: Navigation link to the banned words and patterns management special page
kzchatbot-toplink-slugs: Navigation link to the slugs management special page
kzchatbot-settings-title: Page title for the chatbot general settings special page
kzchatbot-settings-section-throttle: Section heading for the chatbot throttle and rate limiting settings
kzchatbot-settings-section-display: Section heading for the chatbot display settings
kzchatbot-settings-section-general: Section heading for the chatbot general settings
kzchatbot-settings-section-per-user: Section heading for per-user limit settings
kzchatbot-settings-submit: Submit button label for the settings form
kzchatbot-settings-label-new-users-chatb: Label for the field setting the percentage of new users who will see the chatbot
kzchatbot-settings-help-new-users-chatbo: Help text for the new users chatbot rate setting
kzchatbot-settings-label-active-users-li: Label for the maximum active users limit field
kzchatbot-settings-help-active-users-lim: Help text explaining the active users limit setting
kzchatbot-settings-label-current-active-: Label for the read-only field displaying the current number of active users
kzchatbot-settings-label-active-users-li: Label for the field defining how many days of inactivity before a user is no longer considered active
kzchatbot-settings-help-active-users-lim: Help text for the active users limit days setting
kzchatbot-settings-label-questions-daily: Label for the daily question limit setting per user
kzchatbot-settings-label-uuid-request-li: Label for the UUID request limit setting
kzchatbot-settings-help-uuid-request-lim: Help text for the UUID request limit, explaining the per-IP hourly cap for new UUID question requests
kzchatbot-settings-label-cookie-expiry-d: Label for the cookie expiry days setting
kzchatbot-settings-help-cookie-expiry-da: Help text for the cookie expiry days setting
kzchatbot-settings-label-question-charac: Label for the maximum character limit for user questions
kzchatbot-settings-label-feedback-charac: Label for the maximum character limit for user feedback
kzchatbot-settings-label-terms-of-servic: Label for the URL field linking to the terms of service page
kzchatbot-settings-label-usage-help-url: Label for the URL field linking to the usage help or tips page
kzchatbot-settings-status-save-success: Success message displayed after settings are saved successfully
kzchatbot-banned-words-title: Page title for the banned words and patterns management special page
kzchatbot-banned-words-status-empty: Message shown when no banned words or patterns have been defined
kzchatbot-banned-words-label-banned-word: Column/field label for the banned word or regex pattern
kzchatbot-banned-words-op-delete: Link text for the delete action in the banned words list
kzchatbot-banned-words-op-edit: Link text for the edit action in the banned words list
kzchatbot-banned-words-form-new-word: Heading for the form used to add a new banned word or pattern
kzchatbot-banned-words-form-edit-word: Heading for the form used to edit an existing banned word or pattern
kzchatbot-banned-words-help-banned-word: Help text for the word or pattern input field, explaining how to enter a regular expression
kzchatbot-banned-words-label-banned-word: Label for the description field of a banned word entry
kzchatbot-banned-words-help-banned-word-: Help text for the description field, reminding admins to add descriptions especially for regular expressions
kzchatbot-banned-words-label-reply-messa: Label for the reply message field shown to users when they submit a banned word
kzchatbot-banned-words-help-reply-messag: Help text explaining that the reply message is displayed to the user when they try to send a banned word or pattern
kzchatbot-banned-word-submit: Submit button label for the banned word add/edit form
kzchatbot-banned-words-error-empty-strin: Error message shown when the word or pattern field is submitted empty
kzchatbot-banned-words-error-invalid-reg: Error message shown when an invalid regular expression is entered
kzchatbot-banned-words-status-save-succe: Success message after adding a banned word. Parameters: $1 - the word or pattern that was added
kzchatbot-banned-words-status-delete-suc: Success message after removing a banned word. Parameters: $1 - the word or pattern that was removed
kzchatbot-slugs-title: Page title for the slugs and texts management special page
kzchatbot-slugs-status-empty: Message shown when no slugs have been defined
kzchatbot-slugs-label-slug: Column label for the slug identifier
kzchatbot-slugs-label-text: Column label for the slug's text content
kzchatbot-slugs-op-edit: Link text for the edit action in the slugs list
kzchatbot-slugs-op-delete: Link text for the delete action in the slugs list
kzchatbot-slugs-label-add-slug: Label for the slug name input field when adding a new slug
kzchatbot-slugs-label-add-slug-text: Label for the text content input field when adding a new slug
kzchatbot-slug-submit: Submit button label to save a new slug
kzchatbot-slug-update: Button label to save changes to an existing slug
kzchatbot-slugs-error-alphanumeric-only: Error message shown when a slug name contains characters other than alphanumerics and underscores
kzchatbot-slugs-status-save-success: Success message after saving a slug. Parameters: $1 - the slug name
kzchatbot-slugs-status-delete-success: Success message after deleting a slug. Parameters: $1 - the slug name
right-kzchatbot-edit-settings: Description of the user right that allows managing chatbot settings
action-kzchatbot-edit-settings: Action description used in permission error messages when a user tries to edit chatbot settings without the required right
group-chatbot-admin: Display name for the chatbot-admin user group
group-chatbot-admin-member: Display name for a single member of the chatbot-admin group. Parameters: $1 - username; supports GENDER
grouppage-chatbot-admin: Name of the wiki page for the chatbot-admin group
right-kzchatbot-view-settings: Description of the user right that allows viewing (but not editing) chatbot general settings
right-kzchatbot-view-rag-settings: Description of the user right that allows viewing (but not editing) chatbot RAG settings
action-kzchatbot-view-settings: Action description used in permission error messages for viewing chatbot general settings
action-kzchatbot-view-rag-settings: Action description used in permission error messages for viewing chatbot RAG settings
kzchatbot-settings-view-only: Notice displayed to users who have view-only access to the chatbot general settings
kzchatbot-rag-settings-view-only: Notice displayed to users who have view-only access to the RAG settings
group-chatbot-settings-viewer: Display name for the chatbot-settings-viewer user group
group-chatbot-settings-viewer-member: Display name for a single member of the chatbot-settings-viewer group. Parameters: $1 - username; supports GENDER
grouppage-chatbot-setttings-viewer: Name of the wiki page for the chatbot settings viewer group
kzchatbot-rag-settings: Title of the RAG settings special page, also used as a navigation link label
kzchatbot-rag-settings-section-general: Header for the general settings section in the RAG configuration interface
kzchatbot-rag-settings-section-model: Header for the AI model configuration section in the RAG settings
kzchatbot-rag-settings-section-prompts: Header for the section containing prompt configuration settings
kzchatbot-rag-settings-section-restricti: Header for the section containing restriction and filtering settings
kzchatbot-rag-settings-label-version: Label for the configuration version field in the RAG settings
kzchatbot-rag-settings-label-model: Label for the dropdown menu where users select an AI model
kzchatbot-rag-settings-help-model: Help text explaining the model selection dropdown and implications of switching model families
kzchatbot-rag-settings-label-num-of-page: Label for the numeric input field specifying how many pages the model should process
kzchatbot-rag-settings-help-num-of-pages: Help text explaining the page number selector
kzchatbot-rag-settings-label-add-current: Label for the checkbox that controls whether the current page context is included in the LLM prompt
kzchatbot-rag-settings-help-add-current-: Help text explaining the add current page checkbox
kzchatbot-rag-settings-label-temperature: Label for the temperature setting that affects AI response randomness
kzchatbot-rag-settings-help-temperature: Help text explaining how the temperature setting affects AI response randomness
kzchatbot-rag-settings-label-system-prom: Label for the system prompt text input field
kzchatbot-rag-settings-help-system-promp: Help text explaining the system prompt field
kzchatbot-rag-settings-label-user-prompt: Label for the user prompt text input field
kzchatbot-rag-settings-help-user-prompt: Help text explaining the user prompt field
kzchatbot-rag-settings-label-banned-fiel: Label for the text input where users specify fields to be filtered out
kzchatbot-rag-settings-help-banned-field: Help text explaining that banned fields should be entered as comma-separated values
kzchatbot-rag-settings-error-banned-fiel: Error message displayed when the banned fields input has an invalid format
kzchatbot-rag-settings-label-rephrase-pr: Label for the rephrase prompt field, which contains instructions for rephrasing user questions
kzchatbot-rag-settings-help-rephrase-pro: Help text explaining the rephrase prompt field
right-kzchatbot-edit-rag-settings: Description of the user right that allows managing the RAG backend settings
action-kzchatbot-edit-rag-settings: Action description used in permission error messages when a user tries to edit RAG settings without the required right
kzchatbot-rag-settings-error: Generic error heading displayed in the RAG settings form
kzchatbot-rag-settings-error-api-unreach: Error message shown when the RAG API cannot be reached
kzchatbot-rag-settings-error-save: Error message shown when saving RAG settings fails
kzchatbot-rag-settings-save-success: Success message displayed after RAG settings are saved successfully
kzchatbot-rag-settings-error-invalid-res: Error message shown when the RAG API returns an invalid response
kzchatbot-rag-settings-error-execution-f: Error message shown when the RAG API request execution fails
kzchatbot-rag-settings-error-no-change: Message shown when the submitted settings are identical to the current settings
kzchatbot-rag-settings-error-metadata-fa: Error message displayed when the RAG backend's /get_config_metadata endpoint fails or is unreachable
kzchatbot-rag-settings-error-metadata-in: Error message displayed when the RAG backend's /get_config_metadata endpoint returns invalid or malformed metadata
kzchatbot-testing: Name of the chatbot testing special page, used in navigation links
kzchatbot-testing-title: Page title for the chatbot testing interface special page
kzchatbot-testing-document-ids: Label for the document IDs field in the testing interface results
kzchatbot-testing-retrieval-time: Label for the retrieval time metric displayed in test results
kzchatbot-testing-tokens: Label for the token count metric displayed in test results
kzchatbot-testing-current-model-label: Label for displaying the currently configured AI model in the testing interface
kzchatbot-testing-current-model-error-un: Error message displayed when the current model information cannot be retrieved
kzchatbot-testing-models-version-label: Label for displaying the current models version information in the testing interface
kzchatbot-testing-models-error-unknown: Error message displayed when the model version information cannot be retrieved
apihelp-kzchatbotsearch-summary: Summary description of the kzchatbotsearch API module
apihelp-kzchatbotsearch-param-query: Description of the 'query' parameter for the kzchatbotsearch API action
apihelp-kzchatbotsearch-example-simple: Description of the simple usage example for the kzchatbotsearch API
apierror-kzchatbot-api-unreachable: API error message when the chatbot API is unreachable. Parameters: $1 - error details
apierror-kzchatbot-invalid-response: API error message when the chatbot API returns an invalid response
apierror-kzchatbot-search-failed: API error message when the chatbot search operation fails
kzchatbot-testing-batch-title: Section heading for the batch processing area in the testing interface
kzchatbot-testing-batch-cancel: Button label to cancel ongoing batch query processing
kzchatbot-testing-batch-input-label: Label or description for the batch query input area
kzchatbot-testing-batch-output-label: Label for the batch processing results output area
kzchatbot-testing-batch-placeholder: Placeholder text shown in the batch query textarea before the user enters queries
kzchatbot-testing-batch-context-page-pla: Placeholder text for the optional context page title input field
kzchatbot-testing-batch-context-page-hea: Column header for the context page in batch results
kzchatbot-testing-batch-process: Button label to start processing the batch of queries
kzchatbot-testing-batch-download: Button label to download batch processing results as a CSV file
kzchatbot-testing-batch-progress-status: Status message showing batch processing progress. Parameters: $1 - number of queries processed so far, $2 - total number of queries
kzchatbot-testing-batch-progress-cancell: Status message when batch processing is cancelled. Parameters: $1 - number of queries processed, $2 - total number of queries
kzchatbot-testing-batch-result-error: Template for displaying an error result in the output. Parameters: $1 - the query text, $2 - the error message
kzchatbot-testing-batch-result-success: Template for displaying a successful result. Parameters: $1 - query, $2 - response, $3 - model, $4 - time in seconds, $5 - token count
kzchatbot-testing-batch-result-separator: Separator string displayed between individual batch results in the output
kzchatbot-testing-batch-download-filenam: Default filename used when downloading batch results as a CSV file
kzchatbot-testing-batch-progress-error: Status message when batch processing stopped due to an error. Parameters: $1 - number of queries processed, $2 - total
kzchatbot-testing-batch-network-error: Error message displayed when a network failure occurs during batch processing
kzchatbot-testing-batch-unknown-error: Generic error message displayed when an unexpected error occurs during batch processing
right-kzchatbot-testing: Description of the user right that grants access to the chatbot testing interface and API
action-kzchatbot-testing: Action description used in permission error messages for accessing the chatbot testing interface
right-kzchatbot-no-limits: Description of the user right that exempts a user from chatbot usage limits
action-kzchatbot-no-limits: Action description used in permission error messages for using the chatbot without limits
kzchatbot-testing-batch-total-queries: Label displaying the total number of queries in the current batch
kzchatbot-testing-batch-header-number: Column header for the query sequence number in the results table
kzchatbot-testing-batch-header-query: Column header for the query text in the results table
kzchatbot-testing-batch-header-response: Column header for the chatbot response in the results table
kzchatbot-testing-batch-header-documents: Column header for retrieved document links in the results table
kzchatbot-testing-batch-header-filtered-: Column header for filtered document links in the results table
kzchatbot-testing-batch-header-debug: Column header for the debug/details data in the results table
kzchatbot-testing-batch-header-error: Column header for error information in the results table
kzchatbot-testing-batch-input-hint: Placeholder hint text shown inside each query input row
kzchatbot-testing-batch-delete-query: Tooltip or accessible label for the button that removes a query row
kzchatbot-testing-batch-add-query: Tooltip or accessible label for the button that adds a new query row
kzchatbot-testing-batch-initial-query: Placeholder text shown in the first query input row before the user enters anything
kzchatbot-testing-batch-clear-all: Button label to clear all query rows from the batch input
kzchatbot-testing-batch-clear-all-confir: Confirmation dialog message asking the user to confirm clearing all queries
kzchatbot-testing-batch-rephrase-toggle-: Label for the toggle option that enables automatic question rephrasing before sending to the model
kzchatbot-testing-batch-include-debug-da: Label for the toggle option to include debug data in batch results
kzchatbot-testing-batch-send-complete-pa: Label for the toggle option to send complete page content to the LLM instead of excerpts
kzchatbot-testing-batch-options-legend: Legend or heading for the options fieldset in the batch testing interface
kzchatbot-testing-batch-header-original-: Column header for the original (unrephrased) question in the results table
kzchatbot-testing-batch-header-rephrased: Column header for the rephrased version of the question in the results table
kzchatbot-testing-batch-header-response-: Column header for the response time (in seconds) in the results table
kzchatbot-testing-batch-header-rephrase-: Column header for the rephrase processing time (in seconds) in the results table
kzchatbot-testing-nav-to-rag-settings: Navigation link text to go to the RAG settings page from the testing interface
kzchatbot-rag-settings-nav-to-testing: Navigation link text to go to the testing interface from the RAG settings page
kzchatbot-testing-batch-debug-dialog-tit: Title for the dialog that shows detailed data for a single query. Parameters: $1 - the query number
kzchatbot-testing-batch-debug-copy-butto: Button label to copy debug data to the clipboard
kzchatbot-testing-batch-debug-close-butt: Button label to close the debug data dialog
kzchatbot-testing-batch-debug-button-tit: Tooltip for the button that opens the debug details dialog for a query
kzchatbot-testing-batch-debug-copied: Confirmation message shown briefly after debug data is successfully copied to the clipboard
kzchatbot-testing-batch-progress-retry: Progress message shown during a retry attempt. Parameters: $1 - current query number, $2 - total queries, $3 - current retry attempt, $4 - maximum retries
kzchatbot-testing-batch-retry-button: Button label to manually retry a failed query
kzchatbot-testing-batch-retrying: Status text shown while a query retry is in progress
kzchatbot-testing-batch-retrieval-size-l: Label for the retrieval size setting, which controls how many paragraphs are retrieved from Elasticsearch
kzchatbot-testing-batch-retrieval-size-h: Help text for the retrieval size setting
kzchatbot-testing-batch-max-docs-per-pag: Label for the max documents per page setting, which limits how many top-rated paragraphs per page are sent to the LLM
Help text for the max documents per page setting
